title: Import Rules Default Semester Config Plan
定位: 只读审查 + 配置方案设计。不实现功能，不迁移数据库，不修改导入行为。

current-implementation.parse-api: resolveSchedulerSemester() — 无参数，始终使用 active semester
current-implementation.confirm-api: resolveSchedulerSemester({ semesterId: querySemesterId }) — 支持 ?semesterId 覆盖
current-implementation.rollback-api: resolveSchedulerSemester() — 无参数，使用 active semester
current-implementation.abandon-api: resolveSchedulerSemester() — 无参数，使用 active semester
current-implementation.import-ui: 无学期选择器。parseImportFile 只发送文件，不传 semesterId

import-batch-scoping.legacy-null-fixup: confirmImportBatch 会将 null semesterId 绑定到目标学期

permission-boundary.rationale: 配置是 settings 领域；导入操作是 import 领域。分离清晰

A-defaultImportSemesterMode.risk: silent wrong-semester import if UI doesn't clearly show target

B-requireExplicitSemesterForImport.risk: low — false = current behavior, true = safety gate

C-defaultDuplicateImportPolicy.recommendation: defer — separate concern from semester config

D-sourceEvidenceBackfillPolicy.risk: backfill may have data quality issues

recommended-implementation.migration-risk: low — single new table, no existing data
recommended-implementation.rollback: DROP TABLE ImportRuleConfig — config only, no data dependency

ui-contract.guard: When true: upload dialog shows '必须选择目标学期' banner + disabled upload button until semester selected
